findings.description: Naming loom + draft as 'paired halves of one substrate' (not 'alternatives') unlocked the model. Once that framing landed, the coexistence gaps became obvious bugs to fix instead of deferred design questions.
findings.evidence: User correction mid-Phase-1 captured in INTERVIEW.md Q8; PLAN.md revised v2 → v3.

findings.description: Inlining substrate workflows as a § Substrate compositions section in each ev-loop SKILL.md was the right home for the prose that used to live in /loom-pr, /loom-pr-respond, /loom-session, /draft-revise. Duplicated between loops but cheap and self-contained.
findings.evidence: PR #92 D3+D4: +702 SKILL.md lines, -641 from four deleted skills.

findings.description: Drain happened on its own time during Phase 1/2 work. By the time Phase 2 merged, agent-guilds (#90) and draft-cli (#86) had already archived without trout-sunset needing to coordinate. Phase 3 was unblocked the moment Phase 2 merged — no waiting period.
findings.evidence: PRs #90 and #86 merged between Phase 1 and Phase 2.

findings.description: Mid-flight Phase 2 scope expansion (autosave/autoload references migrated alongside the four-skill replacements) was healthy — better than punting them to Phase 3 and bloating the deletion PR.
findings.evidence: User confirmation this interview: 'painless on this one, it expanded in a healthy way'.

findings.description: Recursive bootstrapping bit us — trout-sunset itself adopted loom by manual file writes because bin/loom project adopt didn't exist yet (the very gap Phase 1 closed). Workable but ironic; the meta-project needed the thing it was building.
findings.evidence: Manual manifest.json/config.json/events.jsonl writes during project setup; captured in INTERVIEW.md Q7.

findings.description: Manifest-vs-PLAN drift: when PLAN.md revised v2 → v3 (adding a new Phase 1), manifest.json's phases array stayed at v2 shape. Drift was invisible until archive pre-flight surfaced it.
findings.evidence: trout-sunset's own manifest.json had 2 phases at archive time; PLAN.md v3 had 3.

findings.description: /loom-archive (this skill) interviewed via free-form prose. User prefers the grill-me multi-choice pace from /draft-plan across all interview-style skills.
findings.evidence: User feedback this interview Q1: 'i like the pace of thing... i would like all of these tools to use that pace'.

findings.description: Skill audits should default-delete when the only caller is a loop. /loom-pr, /loom-pr-respond, /loom-session, /draft-revise all earned their slots until the audit rule changed; deleting them sharpened the user-visible chooser.
PLAN revisions should also touch manifest phase metadata (or vice-versa: manifest should derive phase list from PLAN). The current shape lets the two drift silently, as trout-sunset demonstrated.

Revisions should live in a separate additive projects/<slug>/revisions/ folder, not inline in PLAN.md's Revision log section. PLAN.md becomes 'current source of truth'; revisions/ is the additive log. bin/draft revise owns the file mechanism; ev-loops invoke it directly with PLAN.md as the focal artifact.
findings.evidence: User feedback this interview Q3; saved as feedback_revisions_folder_architecture.md.

findings.description: Build the revisions/ folder substrate as a separate project: redesign bin/draft revise to write revisions/<NN>.md instead of appending to PLAN.md's Revision log; update LOOM-CONVENTIONS; update ev-loop SKILL.md § Revise PLAN.md to write a revision file + optionally edit PLAN.md current state. Existing archived projects keep their inline Revision logs.
findings.evidence: User-stated future direction; process-change finding above is the design seed.

findings.description: Adopt draft-plan's grill-me multi-choice pace across all interview-style skills (/loom-archive most urgently; future interview surfaces by default). Substrate primitive: AskUserQuestion with 2-4 discrete options + recommendation labeled + walk-the-tree pacing.
findings.evidence: User feedback this interview Q1; saved as feedback_grill_me_pace_default.md.

findings.description: Loose ends surfaced during trout-sunset that didn't warrant their own follow-ups but should land eventually: bin/loom pr reconcile verb (auto-flip open→merged drift in events when gh confirms PR merged); bin/loom phase update --url= flag (currently synthesizes a placeholder URL); residual makeTroutProject helper rename in .claude/cli/verbs/draft.test.ts (missed in Phase 3 D4).
findings.evidence: Open questions in trout-sunset PLAN.md; minor miss reported after PR #93 merged.
